transcript.text: Hello, Living in Boulder V-Log for the 12th of January, 2014.
It is 7 o'clock in the morning on the 13th right now, but I got up.
I slept last night. I'm going to be a diurnalist now.
I did sleep the day before yesterday, but I didn't get any sleep the night after that.
I forgot to take my melatonin and little Sleepy Time herbal pill.
I should have taken one of my more powerful sleeping pills. I've got those laying around somewhere.
I went over to my mom's house yesterday morning and helped her do a bunch of housework, because she only has one arm.
I threw her arm in the sling. I caught up on stuff.
And then, oh, my brother cooked up a big ol' barbecue chicken.
And all this, a big vat of his special chili, which was really good. It was addictive.
And then, oh yeah, I went over to the bike race, National Cyclocross Championship, with my mom and my cousin.
And we watched the girls, like the last half of the girls, right?
It was a nice day yesterday. It was nice and warm at the beginning, but then the wind kicked up, and all of a sudden it was freezing.
It was cool, though. There were a lot of people there.
And then we went home and watched, oh, the rest of the football game.
The Broncos beat the Chargers.
So now we only have one more game, and then we go to the Super Bowl.
But the next game, I guess, is with the Patriots, so they're a super badass team.
I think I might watch that game if my mom goes over to my mom's.
If my brother goes to my mom's house and watches, I might go over and watch it with him.
And then I stuck around and watched the Golden Globes.
Matthew McConaughey won the Golden Globe for Dallas Buyers Club, which I wanted.
I saw that movie in the movie theater with my mom and brother, and yeah, he did an amazing job in that movie.
It was like the asshole who you like.
And then I came back here, and I was really tired throughout the whole day, though, because I shouldn't sleep the night before.
But, yeah, I was, I got high when I was over there, and my brother came in a little bit, and so I wanted to watch a cartoon.
I got Despicable Me Too, but I got tired as I was watching it, and I needed to take a shower, so I just took a shower and went to bed.
So maybe I'll finish it now.
But as you can see, it's starting to get light out.
So, yeah, I'm a diurnalist again, I think I might try riding on the bike again today.
My body's enough out of hibernation, but I think also maybe my diet got screwed up.
I think maybe I wasn't eating enough protein.
And I ran out of my canned fruit, and I've been forgetting to buy it, because I usually buy canned fruit like 100 cans at a time.
But, yeah, I can buy just a few cans at a time and keep that going.
Little adjustments you make when you first move in.
I've only been here for a couple of months, four months or something, so I'm still adjusting to living in an apartment lifestyle.
So, that's that.
I'll include some video of the bicycle race at the end of this video.
Peace out.
